title: Upload token generation and management per instance
description: Add an admin-only screen and backing table for generating, listing, and revoking upload tokens used by TASK-43's `/api/previews` endpoint, so teams can configure their CI without using a personal admin session.
acceptanceCriteria: New table `upload_tokens (id, token_hash, label, criado_em, revogado_em nullable)` — the raw token is shown once at creation time and never stored/retrievable in plaintext afterward
`uploadTokens.create` (adminProcedure mutation) accepts `{ label }`, generates a cryptographically random token, stores its hash, and returns the plaintext token exactly once in the mutation response
`uploadTokens.list` (adminProcedure query) returns tokens with `label`, `criado_em`, `revogado_em`, never the token value or its hash
`uploadTokens.revoke` (adminProcedure mutation) sets `revogado_em` on a token, after which TASK-43's endpoint must reject it

Admin panel screen at `/admin/settings/tokens` lets an admin generate a labeled token (shown once with a 'copy' affordance and a warning it won't be shown again), list existing tokens, and revoke them

steps.details: Define `uploadTokens` in `apps/server/src/db/schema.ts` with `id, tokenHash, label, criadoEm, revogadoEm (nullable)`. Generate and apply the migration.

In `apps/server/src/auth/uploadTokens.ts`, implement `generateToken()` (e.g. `crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('base64url')`) and hash it with SHA-256 (a fast hash is appropriate here — this is a high-entropy random token, not a user password) before storing.
Add `create`, `list`, `revoke` to a new `apps/server/src/trpc/routers/uploadTokens.ts`, all `adminProcedure`. `create` returns `{ id, label, token }` (plaintext token only in this one response).

steps.description: Wire token validation into TASK-43's upload endpoint
steps.details: In the `/api/previews` handler, hash the incoming bearer token and look up an `upload_tokens` row with matching `token_hash` and `revogado_em IS NULL`; reject 401 otherwise. [Implementado como helper findActiveUploadToken pronto para o handler da TASK-43 — o endpoint ainda não existe; a TASK-43 depende desta.]

Create `apps/admin/src/features/settings/UploadTokens.tsx`: a 'Gerar token' form (label input), a one-time reveal modal showing the plaintext token with a copy button and a 'won't be shown again' warning, a list of existing tokens with a 'Revogar' action per row.
Using Playwright: generate a token, confirm it's shown once; use it to successfully call `/api/previews` (or a mocked equivalent) via an API test; revoke it and confirm subsequent use returns 401.

technicalNotes: Never store or log the plaintext token after the creation response — only the hash persists.
This is intentionally admin-only (not editor) since it grants write access to the instance's public-facing preview content from an external, unauthenticated-by-session CI process.
